title: Miros Minks
body:
This mod adds a biomechanical creature called a Miros Mink for you to befriend and ride! Miros Minks don't have an inventory, but are a good ground and water mount for all-terrain traversal.



- Minks spawn in Swamps and Mangrove Swamps at and can be tamed (and bred!) with raw fish.
- Minks heal slowly over time, but can be healed faster with cooked fish.
- Minks must be tamed and saddled before riding. Optionally, you can craft decorative garlands with [Leather][Leaves][Leather] in a crafting grid.
- Shift right click to equip saddles/garlands, and shift right click with shears to remove equipped items.
- Shift right click with a stick to toggle between wander/follow/sit modes. Minks will automatically get up when attacked, and while wandering will seek out and kill hostile mobs.
- While mounted, use spacebar to jump, G to start charging an AOE attack. The AOE attack must be fully charged before releasing to deal damage, and has a 30sec cooldown. Its affects double against wet mobs!
- Minks can spawn with rare feature variants!
- Minks are immune to lightning, falling, drowning, and cactus damage.
